color_palette.role: primary accent / CTA button fill / active state
deep amber / dark accent stop in gradients

layout.structure: fixed top navbar + full-width hero (centered stack, ~100vh) + scrolling logo strip footer
layout.grid: single centered column in hero; navbar uses flex row space-between

sections.layout_within: centered stack — logo top-left + centered nav + centered headline block + dual CTA buttons inline + centered 3D illustration; scrolling marquee text ribbon at bottom
sections.background: #0A0D08 with radial dark-green ambient glow behind 3D character

sections.layout_within: flex row centered with even spacing
mixed grid cards + embedded UI mockup
centered single card with carousel dots

sections.background: linear gradient #0D0D0D to #1A0E00 with decorative amber arc glow

layout.alignment_system: fully centered — all hero content center-aligned horizontally
layout.responsive_breakpoints_visible: desktop only visible; card grid suggests responsive collapse to single column on mobile

spacing.padding_scale: 8px to 64px in 8px increments; hero vertical padding ~80–100px top
spacing.gap_scale: 12px between CTA buttons inline; 40–48px between headline block and illustration; 24px between nav items
spacing.section_vertical_rhythm: single hero section occupying full viewport; logo strip ~56px height at bottom

shapes_and_geometry.border_radius: primary CTA button: fully pill-shaped (~50px); ghost button: fully pill-shaped (~50px); nav CTA: fully pill-shaped; logo badge: 50% circular; 3D robot character: square body with heavily rounded corners (~24–32px)
shapes_and_geometry.geometric_motifs: large circular ring/arc in lower-left background (low opacity, outlined stroke); two diagonal scrolling marquee text ribbons — one bottom-left to top-right, one bottom-right extending across — acting as kinetic decorative bands; elliptical ambient glow behind 3D character
shapes_and_geometry.dividers: none — sections separated by background contrast; logo strip divided from hero by edge of viewport
shapes_and_geometry.component_silhouettes: pill-shaped buttons; circular logo badge; rectangular nav bar; 3D boxy-rounded robot as central illustration

gradients.applied_to: full hero section background behind 3D character — creates dark green ambient depth
3D robot character top arc / head light strip

shadows_and_depth.elevation_layers: navbar floats as topmost layer; scrolling marquee ribbons appear layered over hero background; 3D robot character sits above background glow as focal z-layer; CTA buttons above body text block

imagery_and_icons.image_treatments: hero: centered 3D rendered robot character with subsurface ambient green lighting and drop shadow — no photo overlay; no filter applied; character presented on transparent background composited over dark gradient
imagery_and_icons.icon_style: filled flat monochromatic; nav logo uses circular badge with X-shaped icon in white on dark green fill; partner logos in logo strip are flat white monochrome
imagery_and_icons.icon_size_range: logo badge ~28–32px; partner logos in strip ~16–24px height
imagery_and_icons.illustration_style: 3D rendered character — boxy humanoid robot with rounded square body, glowing spectrum arc on head (rainbow gradient from blue to green), dark matte body panels, white circular eye-lights; presented as hero centerpiece illustration

visual_effects.textures: possible very subtle dark noise grain on page background at ~3% opacity; not confirmed
visual_effects.overlays: none over character; page background acts as implicit dark overlay on full composition
visual_effects.blur_effects: none visible in static frame; navbar may use backdrop-filter blur
visual_effects.patterns: none repeating; large low-opacity outlined circular ring in lower-left hero quadrant as decorative geometric motif
visual_effects.other_effects: two diagonal scrolling marquee text bands (kinetic marquee ribbons) — lower-left band curves bottom-left to upper-right, right band exits frame right; rainbow spectrum gradient arc on robot head acts as dynamic color focal point against monochromatic dark background; elliptical ambient green light pool beneath character

motion_and_interactivity_hints.implied_transitions: marquee text ribbons imply continuous CSS marquee scroll animation; CTA button glow suggests pulse/breathe hover animation; 3D character may have idle rotation or float animation implied by centered presentation
motion_and_interactivity_hints.interactive_states_visible: primary CTA button in default filled state; ghost button in default outlined state; nav CTA button in default filled state
motion_and_interactivity_hints.animation_style_hints: smooth and continuous — marquee ribbons, ambient glow, and floating character suggest eased infinite animations; likely 60fps CSS or JS-driven

component_patterns.shadow: diffuse ambient #000 60% opacity, blur 60px beneath character
component_patterns.states_visible: default centered display; possible idle float animation

design_style.visual_hierarchy_strength: strong — oversized centered headline commands immediate attention, single vibrant green accent on primary CTA creates clear action focus, 3D character anchors visual weight at center
design_style.primary_design_language: Dark-mode AI product hero with near-black background, oversized centered display typography, a single vivid green accent (#A8FF3E–#22C55E gradient) on the primary CTA, a 3D boxy robot character as central focal illustration, and kinetic diagonal marquee text ribbons reinforcing motion and brand energy
